think:
The plan doc looks clean - no obvious `n` artifacts. The agent fixed the ones it found by rewriting the affected documents. Let me now write the compartment.
For this session, the work was post-commit validation and cleanup. The key findings were: 1. The checklist required `GCP_REGION` and `CLOUD_RUN_API_SERVICE` but the workflow had these as hardcoded defaults - FIXED (workflow now uses vars with defaults) 2. PowerShell `-replace` left literal `` `n`` artifacts in some documentation - FIXED by rewriting those docs 3. Final HTTP surface QA was run and passed 4. Additional correction commits/pushes were made
This is one compartment: post-commit validation and cleanup of the direct GCS upload flow.
Let me write it now.
